name: delete_debug_core
full_help:
delete_debug_core

Description: 
Delete a debug core

Syntax: 
delete_debug_core  [-quiet] [-verbose] <cores>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <cores>     Debug cores to delete

Categories: 
Debug

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
